task: Frontend safety net: ErrorBoundary + i18n + persistent log + CSP
summary: Frontend safety net: ErrorBoundary + i18n + persistent log + CSP
reason: v0.3 silent crash on uncaught error, no log file, CSP=allow-all. v0.4 wraps React in ErrorBoundary with copy/restart/report, daily-rolling log file via tracing-appender, strict CSP via Tauri 2 schema.
